title: Dark Imposter: Crewmate Kill
description: Developed a mobile stealth-action game using Unity (C#), focusing on core gameplay systems, AI behavior, and level progression. Implemented smooth player controls, enemy interactions, and engaging mechanics for scalable, replayable gameplay.
learned: Designed and implemented core gameplay systems and mechanics. Developed AI behavior and enemy interaction logic. Built scalable level progression systems. Collaborated with publisher (OneSoft) to refine gameplay based on feedback and release requirements

title: Carwell: Battle Arena
description: Developed a multiplayer car combat game for mobile using Unity (C#), focusing on core gameplay systems, vehicle mechanics, and online interactions. Implemented shooting, drifting, and resource management systems, along with dynamic obstacles and enemy behaviors to create fast-paced, replayable gameplay.
learned: Built core gameplay and multiplayer systems, integrated monetization and analytics tools, and ensured smooth performance and scalability on mobile devices.

title: Shadow of Nexus
description: Developed a top-down shooter game focusing on dynamic mission design, combat systems, and player progression. Implemented diverse mission objectives, enemy behaviors, and a variety of weapons and upgrades to create fast-paced, replayable gameplay.
learned: Designed and implemented core combat systems, developed dynamic mission structures, and created enemy AI behaviors to support varied gameplay scenarios.

title: Robot War
description: Developed a top-down shooter game focusing on dynamic mission design, combat systems, and player progression. Implemented diverse mission objectives, enemy behaviors, and a variety of weapons and upgrades to create fast-paced, replayable gameplay.
learned: Designed and implemented core combat systems, developed dynamic mission structures, and created enemy AI behaviors to support varied gameplay scenarios.

title: OVERLODE: Battle over Azmonite
description: Worked as part of a development team on OVERLODE: Battle over Azmonite, contributing to the design and implementation of core gameplay systems. Collaborated with other developers and designers to build scalable mechanics, ensure smooth system integration, and maintain code quality across shared components.Focused on delivering responsive gameplay features while aligning with the overall game vision and team workflow.
learned: Working in a team environment taught me how to design systems that are modular, maintainable, and easy to integrate with other components. I improved my ability to collaborate with different roles, communicate technical ideas clearly, and adapt my code based on team needs and feedback.I also gained deeper experience in structuring gameplay systems such as AI behavior (FSM) and pathfinding (A*), while ensuring performance and scalability in a real-time action context.

title: NFT Duel
description: Worked as a Gameplay Developer on an NFT-based trading card game using Unity (C#), focusing on designing and implementing scalable gameplay systems. Developed dynamic card ability systems, integrated Photon for multiplayer interactions, and contributed to advanced AI behaviors for strategic gameplay. Helped build flexible mechanics to support diverse decks and competitive dueling experiences.
learned: Designed and implemented dynamic card ability systems, developed scalable gameplay mechanics, and contributed to multiplayer integration and advanced AI behavior to support strategic and competitive gameplay.

title: Line Colors
description: Developed a hyper-casual 2D mobile game using Unity (C#), featuring color-based shooting mechanics and procedurally generated levels to ensure varied and replayable gameplay. Implemented core systems including level-based progression, inventory management, and adaptive soundtrack integration. Integrated PlayFab for backend services and AdMob for monetization, optimizing performance and user experience for mobile platforms.
learned: Designed and implemented core shooting mechanics, developed procedural level generation, and built progression and inventory systems to support engaging and replayable gameplay.
